name: Lemon Thyme Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds boned and skinned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a dish large enough to hold it all in one layer.
2. Break the thyme sprigs in half and toss them over the chicken with the garlic.
3. Toss the chicken, garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, and black pepper until everything is evenly coated.
4. Cover the dish and refrigerate for 6-8 hours, turning the chicken 3-4 times during this time.
5. Before cooking, brush the marinade off the chicken.
6. Grill over medium hot coals (or use a broiler) for about 10 minutes, turning frequently and sprinkling with a little salt when almost done.
